description: Golden evaluation set for the benefits assistant. Each case defines the question, the documents a correct answer must be grounded in, and expectations used by the automated evaluation suite.

cases.question: How many PTO days do full-time employees get per year?
Can I carry over unused PTO to next year?
How far in advance must PTO requests be submitted?
Which medical plan includes dental and vision coverage?
As a new hire, how long do I have to enroll in a medical plan?
What is the company 401(k) match percentage?
How many days per week can I work remotely?
What is the parental leave policy?
How do I exercise my stock options?
